nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 馬氏橙額鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 馬氏橙額鸚鵡（Cyanoramphus malherbi，学名 Cyanoramphus malherbi），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于南島 (新西蘭)、Hurunui River、Hawdon River，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、外来捕食者。

nodes.name: Hawdon River
nodes.summary: The Hawdon River is a river of New Zealand.

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 南島 (新西蘭)
nodes.summary: 南島 (新西蘭)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括白眶几维、New Zealand grebe、Spotless crake等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Hurunui River
nodes.summary: Hurunui River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括大斑几维鸟、馬氏橙額鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species is found in only three regions on New Zealand's South Island: the South Branch Hurunui River Valley, Hawdon River Valley, and the Poulter Valley

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The original decline in population was most likely due to habitat destruction and fragmentation by human activity, hunting,Innes, J; Kelly, D; Overton, J; Gilles, C

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: J.|date=1 January 1996|title=Predators and the decline of New Zealand forest birds: An introduction to the hole-nesting bird and predator programme|journal=New Zealand Journal of Zoology|volume=23|issue=3|pages=213–219|doi=10.1080/03014223.1996.9518080|issn=0301-4223|doi-access=free}} The biggest limitation of this species today is predation by introduced mammalian pests. Orange-fronted parakeets evolved in isolation from land mammals, so are especially vulnerable to introduced predators
